title: Xplore Bulgaria
subTitle: Bulgaria is quite a revelation starting from Plovidiv's old town to Sunny Beach's friendly atmosphere to the historic sites of Nessebar.

title: World Spas
subTitle: The host experiences the nurturing environment and luxurious treatment provided at the largest spa in the Middle East, located in Jordan.

title: 50 States Florida
subTitle: Iona begins her 50 states journey in Florida, where familiar coastlines and hidden corners reveal fresh stories.

title: Costa Rica Calling
subTitle: Genevieve ventures deep into Puntarenas and seeks an adrenaline rush in the lush embrace of Monteverde, a canton of the province.

title: Local Flavours
subTitle: The host embarks on a journey across the country and explore various authentic and local cuisines and tries to prepare them in their own way.

title: World Heritage
subTitle: Filmmakers highlight iconic sites such as the Giza Pyramids, the necropolis, and the exquisite ottoman architecture of Cairo's Muhammad Ali Mosque to convey the historical grandeur of Egypt.

title: Bliss
subTitle: The host travels to Himandhoo and enjoys the exciting experiences of snorkelling, shark feeding, wine tasting and kayaking.

title: Best From the Rest
subTitle: With intriguing places and experiences, Taiwan is an exciting country to explore. Five best places to visit in this east Asian nation are showcased to the audience.

subTitle: The host sheds light on Mines Wellness, which features a floor where rooms are designed to offer a holistic wellness experience.

subTitle: Genevieve pays a visit to the charming town of Zarcero, where she chances upon the prized cheese of the country of Costa Rica.

subTitle: The host explores different world heritage sites approved by UNESCO as timeless and sheds light upon the architectural structures in the contemporary era.

subTitle: The host goes on to explore some of the most noteworthy places that are of religious and cultural significance in Muscat, Oman.

subTitle: The host visits the town of Badami in Karnataka, India, to explore the cultural heritage, cuisines, natural beauty and communal activities offered by the locality.

subTitle: Chef Damu prepares lesser-known or lost recipes to revive the Tamilian culture. The heritage recipes are not only pleasant on the taste buds but also made from naturally-sourced ingredients.
